description: An interior scene within a magnificent Moorish palace hall with slender columns and horseshoe arches. A large tiger lies dead on an ornate blue carpet strewn with roses. Two tall candles flank the animal. Beside the tiger, a man in rich oriental dress and turban sits in a posture of grief, leaning his head on one hand. The architecture is grand with warm golden stone and intricate detailing. The atmosphere is one of solemn mourning.
